title: VideoML maintenance documentation exists
description: Document the VideoML pipeline so new contributors can render, preview, and publish videos without tribal knowledge.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Feature: VideoML maintenance docs
  Scenario: AGENTS.md documents video workflow
    Given I open AGENTS.md
    Then I see instructions for rendering and uploading videos
    And required environment variables are listed

  Scenario: videos/README documents pipeline
    Given I open videos/README.md
    Then I see steps for bundling components
    And generating scripts
    And rendering the intro video
